reviews.review_title: A fun & fresh way of learning
reviews.review_description: Lora offers a fun way to learn some foreign words or freshen up on your basic vocabulary, like numbers and foods. It offers a variety of languages to choose from. Lora is the perfect app for the school-aged children who are learning a new language in school. This is a fresh way to test their knowledge. The dev is very proactive and responsive to feedback and updates. And the game is free, so why not?
Incredibly easy to use app. Learning Spanish while playing fun games was perfect. I will constantly use this app as I try to learn a new language.

I really enjoyed playing the "slash and shoot" game while identifying the correct Korean words as they were mentioned. It was a fun and interactive way to learn, and I even picked up a bit more Korean! My interest in the language actually started from watching Korean movies, and this game added another exciting layer to my learning journey.

reviews.review_title: Lora Games Away The Language Barrier
reviews.review_description:
While VR gaming community may seem
 small to the data miners, bean counters and investors, the community I love has an enormous reach ; a globa reachl. Lora will undoubtedly only strengthen and bolster that community by gaming the language barriers.  
It's fun, immersive and the added customization features will increase the game's user retention rate. 
We all learn in different ways, but VR teaches through an experience with a personalized pathway with its AI model.
No more hours of tortuous conjugation of words you will never use .
Lora is a part of VR's bright future. We should all ensure its success!

reviews.review_title: Very impressive, fun and usefull app !
reviews.review_description: Very impressive, fun and usefull app !
Loves talking to AI teacher and playing games. Looking forward to the games updates & build outs.

I speak a little French but must admit that learning more French was super entertaining using this app.  You will also be active moving around slicing and shooting so it is definitely not boring!!!  Love the environment & the entire idea behind it.  It is challenging in a fun way.  Looking forward to exploring it more.  Thank you devs.. what a cool idea to put this together 🌟

reviews.review_title: I love all the different languages
reviews.review_description: It is really cool to be able to select a language and then another.  The variety is good and so is the pronunciation.  They have a section where you shoot or try to sword the object. And another, you have 4 buttons you can push to find the answer to an object (my preferred method). Good luck and enjoy

Come try this fun language learning app. I have been testing and having a lot of fun. The dev just released an update with bug fixes before coming to the official Meta store. If you find bugs, you can report them on their discord and they will get them fixed! Very active and responsive dev. Tell them you saw my review on the discord and come chat with me! Keep learning!

reviews.review_title: A new fun way to learn languages in VR
reviews.review_description:
A very good idea for VR, this application for learning languages ​​while player still can have fun. The shooters and slashes may not as good as other but you'll understand that it's not the main purpose of Lora.
‍

reviews.review_title: A very fun way to learn new languages
reviews.review_description: Very fun to play and nice to chat with the robots
